name: Autonomous VR-Based Risk Detection for Situational Awareness in Dangerous Settings
summary: arXiv:2607.16582v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In high-risk environments such as disaster response, situational awareness depends not only on detecting hazards but also on communicating them cle...
description: arXiv:2607.16582v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In high-risk environments such as disaster response, situational awareness depends not only on detecting hazards but also on communicating them clearly to human operators. Vision Language Models (VLMs) have shown strong potential for scene understanding in safety-critical settings, yet their value as part of human-facing robotic systems remains...
author: Mohammad Eskandari, Murali Krishna Varma Indukuri, Stephanie M. Lukin, Cynthia Matuszek
